title: Closeout: Thermal Buffeting Plume (019e5f) - Knowledge Curator role clarified
body: Curator pass complete for role-substrate clarification. Live practice fitness was soft-only in informational and strict-hard modes, so no critical/hard emergency route was needed. Clarified that canonical role key is curator and Knowledge Curator is the owner-facing/session label in PDR-081, curator-pass SKILL, curator-passes README, and start-right-team role language. Added metadata-only pass log at .agent/memory/operational/curator-passes/2026-05-25-thermal-buffeting-plume.md. Focused markdownlint and git diff --check passed.
